info.title: Legisway API
info.description:
The Legisway REST API provides programmatic access to the Legisway legal management platform by Wolters Kluwer. Legisway centralizes all legal department operations including contract lifecycle management, corporate entity administration, claims and litigation tracking, vendor management, intellectual property portfolios, real estate assets, and privacy and risk compliance.

Key capabilities include:
- Contract lifecycle management (creation, negotiation, approval, execution, renewal, termination)
- Corporate entity and subsidiary management with shareholding and mandates
- Claims and litigation case tracking
- Vendor assessment and management
- Intellectual property portfolio management (trademarks, patents, domains)
- Real estate asset management
- Privacy and risk register (GDPR data processing, risk incidents)
- Document management with version control
- User and access control management
- Webhook subscriptions for real-time event notifications

Authentication is supported via OAuth 2.0 (authorization code flow) and API key. All API responses use JSON format. Paginated list endpoints return a maximum of 100 records per page by default.

tags.name: Contracts
tags.description: Contract lifecycle management: create, retrieve, update, and manage contracts through their full lifecycle including negotiation, approval, execution, renewal, and termination.

tags.name: Entities
tags.description: Corporate entity management: subsidiaries, holdings, mandates, shareholding structures, and organizational hierarchies.

tags.name: Claims
tags.description: Claims and litigation tracking: manage legal disputes, claims, court cases, and related proceedings.

tags.name: Vendors
tags.description: Vendor management: vendor profiles, assessments, risk categorization, and SOC report archiving.

tags.name: Intellectual Property
tags.description: Intellectual property portfolio management: trademarks, patents, domain names, copyrights, and design rights.

tags.name: Real Estate
tags.description: Real estate asset management: property records, leases, and site information.

tags.name: Privacy
tags.description: Privacy and risk compliance: data processing registers, risk assessments, and incident reporting (GDPR).

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Document management: upload, download, and manage documents attached to any legal object.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User and access management: user profiles, roles, and permissions.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook subscriptions for real-time notifications on resource changes.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contracts. Supports filtering by status, type, counterparty, and date ranges.

parameters.name: counterparty_id
parameters.description: Filter by counterparty (vendor or entity) ID.

parameters.name: start_date_from
parameters.description: Filter contracts with start date on or after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: start_date_to
parameters.description: Filter contracts with start date on or before this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: expiry_date_from
parameters.description: Filter contracts with expiry date on or after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: expiry_date_to
parameters.description: Filter contracts with expiry date on or before this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across contract title, reference, and description.

post.description: Creates a new contract record. The contract is created in draft status by default.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single contract by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing contract. Only provided fields are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

delete.description: Deletes a contract. Only contracts in draft status can be deleted. Active contracts must be terminated first.

get.description: Returns the clauses associated with a contract.

post.summary: Add a clause to a contract
post.description: Adds a new clause to an existing contract.

get.description: Returns the approval workflow history for a contract.

post.description: Submits a contract for approval. The contract must be in draft or in_negotiation status.
Initiates a renewal for an active or expiring contract. Creates a new contract version linked to the original.

new_end_date.description: The new end date for the renewed contract.

post.description: Terminates an active contract. Records the termination date and reason.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of corporate entities (subsidiaries, holdings, etc.).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across entity name and registration number.

post.description: Creates a new corporate entity record.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single corporate entity.

delete.description: Deletes a corporate entity. Only entities with no active contracts or linked records can be deleted.

get.description: Returns the list of mandates (directors, officers, board members) for a corporate entity.

post.summary: Create a mandate for an entity
post.description: Creates a new mandate (director, officer, or board member appointment) for a corporate entity.

get.description: Returns the shareholder structure for a corporate entity.
Returns a paginated list of claims and litigation cases.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across claim reference and description.

post.description: Creates a new claim or litigation case.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single claim or litigation case.

put.description: Updates an existing claim or litigation case.

delete.description: Deletes a claim. Only claims in open status with no linked proceedings can be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of vendors with their assessment and categorization details.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across vendor name and reference.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single vendor.

delete.description: Deletes a vendor. Only vendors with no active contracts can be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of intellectual property assets including trademarks, patents, domain names, copyrights, and design rights.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across IP title, reference number, and description.

200.description: A paginated list of IP assets.

post.description: Creates a new intellectual property asset record.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single IP asset.

put.description: Updates an existing IP asset record.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of real estate assets and property records.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across property name and address.

200.description: A paginated list of real estate assets.

post.description: Creates a new real estate asset record.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single real estate asset.

put.description: Updates an existing real estate asset record.

delete.description: Deletes a real estate asset record.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of data processing records for GDPR compliance.

parameters.name: legal_basis
parameters.description: Filter by legal basis for processing.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Filter by data controller entity ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across processing activity name and purpose.

200.description: A paginated list of data processing records.

post.description: Creates a new data processing record for GDPR register of processing activities.

get.description: Returns the full details of a single data processing record.

put.description: Updates an existing data processing record.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of risk assessments and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs).

200.description: A paginated list of risk assessments.

post.description: Creates a new risk assessment or data protection impact assessment.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of privacy and data breach incidents.

200.description: A paginated list of privacy incidents.

post.description: Reports a new privacy or data breach incident.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of documents. Documents can be filtered by the resource they are attached to.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Filter by the type of resource the document is attached to.

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: Filter by the ID of the resource the document is attached to.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across document name and description.

post.description: Uploads a new document and optionally attaches it to a resource (contract, entity, claim, etc.).

resource_type.description: Type of resource to attach the document to.

resource_id.description: ID of the resource to attach the document to.

413.description: File too large. Maximum file size is 100MB.

get.description: Returns the metadata of a single document.

delete.description: Deletes a document and its file from storage.

get.description: Downloads the binary content of a document.
Returns a paginated list of users with their roles and access permissions.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across user name and email.

post.description: Creates a new user and sends an invitation email.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Returns the full details of a single user.

put.description: Updates an existing user's profile and permissions.

delete.description: Deactivates a user account. The user is not permanently deleted but is prevented from accessing the system.

get.description: Returns a list of all webhook subscriptions for the current application.

post.description: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive real-time notifications for resource changes.

get.description: Returns the details of a single webhook subscription.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for Legisway. Register your application in the Legisway Administration portal to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret. Access tokens are valid for 3600 seconds (1 hour). Refresh tokens are valid for 30 days.

scopes.claims:read: Read access to claims and litigation
scopes.ip:read: Read access to intellectual property assets
scopes.real_estate:read: Read access to real estate assets
scopes.real_estate:write: Create and update real estate assets
scopes.privacy:read: Read access to privacy records, risk assessments, and incidents

scopes.claims:read: Read access to claims and litigation
scopes.ip:read: Read access to intellectual property assets
scopes.real_estate:read: Read access to real estate assets
scopes.real_estate:write: Create and update real estate assets

apiKey.description: API key authentication. Include the API key in the X-API-Key request header. API keys can be generated in the Legisway Administration portal under Settings > API Keys. Each API key is scoped to specific permissions and can be revoked at any time.
apiKey.name: X-API-Key

PageSizeParam.name: page_size
PageSizeParam.description: Number of records per page. Maximum 100.

SortParam.name: sort
SortParam.description: Sort field and direction. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., '-created_at').

EntityIdParam.name: entityId
EntityIdParam.description: Unique identifier for the corporate entity.

IPAssetIdParam.name: ipAssetId
IPAssetIdParam.description: Unique identifier for the intellectual property asset.

PropertyIdParam.name: propertyId
PropertyIdParam.description: Unique identifier for the real estate property.

RecordIdParam.name: recordId
RecordIdParam.description: Unique identifier for the data processing record.

WebhookIdParam.name: webhookId
WebhookIdParam.description: Unique identifier for the webhook subscription.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. The request body or parameters are invalid.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. The authenticated user does not have permission to perform this action.

NotFound.description: Not found. The requested resource does not exist.

Conflict.description: Conflict. The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

UnprocessableEntity.description: Unprocessable entity. The request is well-formed but contains semantic errors.

TooManyRequests.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the period indicated in the Retry-After header.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum number of requests per window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current window.

details.description: Additional error details for validation errors.

field.description: The field that caused the error.

type.description: Contract type (e.g., NDA, service agreement, licensing).

counterparty_id.description: ID of the counterparty (vendor or entity).

notice_period_days.description: Notice period in days before renewal/expiry.

responsible_user_id.description: ID of the user responsible for this contract.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the contract was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contract was last updated.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the contract.

type.description: Clause type (e.g., termination, liability, confidentiality, indemnification).

is_standard.description: Whether this is a standard clause from the clause library.

approver_id.description: ID of the user to approve the contract.

due_date.description: Due date for the approval decision.

legal_form.description: Legal form (e.g., LLC, SA, GmbH, BV, Ltd).

person_name.description: Name of the person holding the mandate.

role.description: Role or title (e.g., Director, CEO, Board Member, Secretary).

shareholder_name.description: Name of the shareholder (person or entity).

shareholder_type.description: Whether the shareholder is an individual or corporate entity.

shareholder_entity_id.description: If corporate, the ID of the shareholder entity in Legisway.

soc_report_type.description: SOC report type (e.g., SOC 1, SOC 2 Type I, SOC 2 Type II).

title.description: Title or name of the IP asset.

jurisdictions.description: Countries or regions where the IP is registered/protected.

international_transfers.description: Whether data is transferred outside the EEA.

transfer_safeguards.description: Safeguards for international transfers (e.g., SCCs, adequacy decision).

notification_date.description: Date the supervisory authority was notified.

resource_type.description: Type of resource this document is attached to.

url.description: The URL to receive webhook notifications.

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to.

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature verification.
Shared secret for webhook signature verification. If not provided, one will be generated.
